hooks.prompt: The user is about to run: $ARGUMENTS. If this is a 'git push' command, ALLOW it but first instruct Claude to: 1) Run security checks (XSS, input validation, CORS, rate limiting) 2) Run UX/accessibility checks (focus states, contrast, labels, touch targets, reduced-motion) 3) Check analytics (tracking events on all pages, no PII leaks) 4) Check code quality (no console.logs with sensitive data, no hardcoded URLs, error handling) 5) Generate an updated Full Regression Test Plan .docx to ~/Downloads/ with all current tests covering any new or changed features. After all checks pass and the doc is generated, give a GO/NO-GO verdict. If GO, ALLOW the push. If NO-GO, BLOCK with explanation. If it is NOT a git push command, ALLOW it silently.
